description: Urban Tracker Sherbrooke sequence: downtown Montreal intersection (fixed IP camera, 2011). Correspondences use the intersection box: the far and near boundary lines of the cross street (Hough-detected) where they meet the mouth of the vertical street. Assumed real geometry: cross street width 13.5 m (four ~3.4 m lanes), vertical street mouth 11 m between boundary line endpoints. Approximate calibration pending survey data; validated by speed plausibility.

points.note: far boundary x left mouth edge
far boundary x right mouth edge
near boundary x left mouth edge
near boundary x right mouth edge
